GlobalVariables.StudyDescription: This file contains the metadata, events, and data for REDCap project "Self-Reported Symptoms Hantavirus".

redcap:Surveys.title: Self-Reported Symptoms Hantavirus
redcap:Surveys.instructions:
Please complete this daily survey about your symptoms and health today. Your responses help us monitor changes over time and support our research.

Thank you!
redcap:Surveys.acknowledgement: Thank you for participating in this research study.
redcap:Surveys.response_limit_custom_text: Thank you for your interest; however, the survey is closed because the maximum number of responses has been reached.

ItemGroupDef.Name: SYMPTOMS: Indicate if experienced between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.

Question.TranslatedText: Enter the participant number assigned by the study staff It should have 5 characters, a hyphen, and four digits (e.g. Y0401-0001)

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - today). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - today). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: Did you measure your temperature today?
What was the highest temperature you measured today

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (32 - 106.7). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (32 - 106.7). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: What units is your temperature measured in?
Did you measure your oxygen saturation today?
What was the lowest oxygen saturation value you measured today (%)

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - 100). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

ItemDef.Name: sympt_dailydata
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: SYMPTOMS: Indicate if experienced between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.

Question.TranslatedText: In the previous 24 hours, did you experience any of the symptoms below?
Severe bleeding (requiring the intervention of a health care provider)
Please read each statement and indicate how you feel right now, in this moment.
How would you rate your health today?
How likely do you think it is that you will develop symptoms of hantavirus?
How serious do you think it would be for you if you were to develop symptoms of hantavirus?
Please indicate how much you agree or disagree with this statement: There are people I can depend on to help me if I really need it.

Decode.TranslatedText: Can't feel one side of the body or face (Hemiplegia)
Can't fully move or control movement (Paralytic syndrome)
Disorders of nose and nasal sinuses
Can't feel one side of the body or face (Hemiplegia)
Can't fully move or control movement (Paralytic syndrome)
Disorders of nose and nasal sinuses
Can't feel one side of the body or face (Hemiplegia)
Can't fully move or control movement (Paralytic syndrome)
Disorders of nose and nasal sinuses
Can't feel one side of the body or face (Hemiplegia)
Can't fully move or control movement (Paralytic syndrome)
Disorders of nose and nasal sinuses
Can't feel one side of the body or face (Hemiplegia)
Can't fully move or control movement (Paralytic syndrome)
Disorders of nose and nasal sinuses
